title: Settings
objectivesHint: Pick the habits that make up your daily missions (at least 3).
savingsHint: Set what you used to spend, to estimate what you save by staying alcohol-free.

notifications.title: Daily reminder
notifications.enabled: Reminder set! We'll ping you daily.
notifications.permissionDenied: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings.

deleteWarning: This erases your hero, streaks and progress. It can't be undone.
